title: A Day at the Two Peas Office
excerpt: A few weeks ago, thanks to a family friend's wedding, I found myself in Middleton, Wisconsin, where Two Peas In A Bucket is headquartered. I had the unique opportunity of spending the day in the office & warehouse. Meeting many…
body:
A few weeks ago, thanks to a family friend's wedding, I found myself in Middleton, Wisconsin, where Two Peas In A Bucket is headquartered. I had the unique opportunity of spending the day in the office & warehouse. Meeting many of the wonderful people who work there and getting a cool, behind-the-scenes glimpse were both highlights of the visit.

Kristina and I started playing around with this Daybook, adding our favorite items, like washi tape and these Thickers to the cover.

We look pretty serious here while deciding what to stick, and where to stick it. But I promise we were having heaps of fun. Here is where we went from serious to silly in a matter of minutes…

And then it was back to work again with Kristina doodling on some packages for the Garden Girls. How cute is Jamie and her due-very-soon belly?

I tried not to drool over the aisles and aisles of pretty patterned papers.

Not too shabby for a Friday at the office. Grateful to have the opportunities to sometimes blur the lines between work and play. Thanks Two Peas for a fun and productive day! You can see Jamie's post with more photos on the Two Peas blog and Kristina's thoughts on creating the Daybook here.

PS- Some very sweet scrapbookers have put together a group on Facebook called Daybook Delights!
